# ENTEVATE — Human-Centered Innovation Partner

> ENTEVATE partners with organizations ready to evolve — designing immersive brand experiences, aligning digital content, and building actionable roadmaps for lasting impact.

## Company Overview

ENTEVATE is a human-centered innovation consultancy operating at the intersection of three pillars: Experiential Branding & Marketing, Digital & Content Transformation, and Innovation Ecosystems & Venture Development.

We work with Fortune 500 enterprises, manufacturing and industrial companies, universities and research institutions, economic development organizations, innovation districts, and technology startups.

Website: https://www.entevate.com
Contact: https://www.entevate.com/contact

## Three Pillars

### 1. Experiential Branding & Marketing
Design and execute immersive, emotionally engaging brand experiences for trade shows, events, and digital touchpoints. Powered by Momentify — our proprietary platform for in-person engagement with ROX™ (Return on Experience) scoring.
- Trade show activations and exhibit design
- AR/VR/spatial computing experiences
- Brand strategy and experiential marketing
- Momentify platform for engagement measurement
URL: https://www.entevate.com/experiential

### 2. Digital & Content Transformation
Align people, platforms, and processes through Content Readiness™ — our proprietary framework for evaluating and optimizing written, visual, and animated content across every digital and immersive channel.
- Content Readiness™ assessment and scoring
- Digital transformation strategy and execution
- CAD-to-CGI conversion and visualization
- Remote assistance and spatial workflows
- Learning & development, change management
URL: https://www.entevate.com/transformation

### 3. Innovation | Ventures | Ecosystem
Co-create actionable innovation roadmaps that move ecosystems, ventures, and teams from ideation through amplification.
- Innovation Roadmapping™ (8-stage methodology from Ideation to Amplification)
- Ecosystem Model: 7 Core Elements™ framework for mapping innovation ecosystems
- Innovation Sandbox™ for prototyping and validating ideas
- AIQUI framework for AI and quantum innovation
- Sideline Capital activation and venture development
- Angel Academy™: Investor education program activating sideline capital for early-stage ventures through workshops, ecosystem engagement, and curated deal flow
URL: https://www.entevate.com/innovation
Angel Academy URL: https://www.entevate.com/innovation/angel-academy

## Proprietary Frameworks & Tools

- **Content Readiness™**: Assessment methodology for evaluating content preparedness across digital and immersive platforms
- **Momentify**: Operating system for in-person engagement with ROX™ (Return on Experience) scoring
- **Innovation Roadmapping™**: 8-stage process — Ideation, Validation, Business Case, Prototyping, Operationalization, Go-to-Market, Amplification, Scale
- **7 Core Elements™**: Comprehensive framework for mapping every stakeholder, sector, and stage in an innovation ecosystem
- **Innovation Sandbox™**: Contained environment for prototyping and validating promising ideas with low risk and fast learning
- **AIQUI**: Applied framework for AI and quantum innovation across seven core basecamps
- **Core Elements Basecamps™**: Structured activation points within the 7 Core Elements ecosystem
- **Angel Academy™**: Hands-on investor education program for accredited investors with four progressive stages (Pre-Flight, Earning Your Wings, Wheels Up, Successful Landing)
- **Raise Your Game™**: Companion CxO bootcamp preparing startup founders to be investor-ready

## Target Personas

- **Fortune 500 & Enterprise**: Trade show activations, digital transformation, content optimization
- **Manufacturing & Industrial**: CAD-to-CGI conversion, AR remote assistance, spatial workflows
- **Universities & Research Institutions**: Innovation ecosystem mapping, AIQUI framework, sandbox prototyping
- **Economic Development Organizations**: Ecosystem model design, innovation district strategy, stakeholder alignment
- **Innovation Districts & Cities**: 7 Core Elements mapping, roadmapping, venture development
- **Startups & Ventures**: Innovation Sandbox prototyping, roadmapping, go-to-market strategy

## Case Studies

- Fortune 500 Trade Show Activation: AR-powered multi-zone exhibit design
- Energy Innovation Lab: Innovation lab build from roadmap to live experimentation
- Trinity College AIQUI Sandbox: AI and quantum innovation ecosystem mapping

## Insights & Thought Leadership

ENTEVATE publishes insights on experiential branding, AR/VR strategy, digital transformation, innovation roadmapping, and emerging technology adoption.

## Full Documentation

For detailed information, see: https://www.entevate.com/llms-full.txt
